message:
fix(providers): suppress clippy::too_many_lines on AzureOpenAI Provider impl

The AzureOpenAIProvider impl block exceeds clippy's line-count threshold
but splitting it would be artificial — add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)]
to suppress the lint pragmatically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
